creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text: I have an additional warning: html/graphene-Euler.html:362: warning: no link for: "NULL:CAPS" -> (NULL). html/graphene-GObject-integration.html:56: warning: no link for: "GValue" -> (GValue). html/graphene-GObject-integration.html:56: warning: no link for: "GParamSpec" -> (GParamSpec). html/graphene-GObject-integration.html:57: warning: no link for: "GObject" -> (GObject). html/graphene-GObject-integration.html:77: warning: no link for: "g-value-set-boxed" -> (g_value_set_boxed()). html/graphene-GObject-integration.html:77: warning: no link for: "g-value-get-boxed" -> (g_value_get_boxed()).
